title: thelypteris benguetensis
intro: Thelypteris benguetensis, also known as Benguet fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae and is native to the Philippines. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Thelypteris benguetensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing pain and improving overall well-being. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water to create a medicinal remedy.
